Topic lookup table for the sap repository

Source: R/data.R
topic_lookup.Rd

Maps each branch of the sap GitHub repository to its book part and chapter in the Shiny App-Packages book.

Usage

topic_lookup

Format

A data frame with 40 rows and 3 columns:

branch

Character. The branch name (e.g., "05_roxygen2").

part

Character. The book part the branch belongs to (e.g., "App-packages", "Tests", "Deploy", "Frameworks", "Shiny & LLMs").

chapter

Character. The chapter topic (e.g., "Documentation").

Source

https://github.com/mjfrigaard/sap

On this page

Developed by Martin Frigaard.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
